info.title: MerrySails Public API
info.summary: Discovery resources for Bosphorus cruises and yacht charter in Istanbul.
info.description: MerrySails is a Bosphorus cruise & yacht charter operator. This document declares discovery resources for AI agents and integrators. There is no programmatic booking endpoint — reservations go through the form at /reservation or WhatsApp, and every booking is reviewed by a human operator before it's confirmed.

get.summary: Compact Markdown reference for AI agents.

externalDocs.description: Agent + booking reference (compact, preferred for AI consumption).
